{"problem_standardized_math":"Consider the optimization problem\n\\[\n\\min_{x\\in\\mathbf{R}^2} f(x)=-2x_1+x_2\n\\quad\\text{subject to}\\quad\n\\begin{cases}\n(1-x_1)^3-x_2 \\ge 0,\\\\\nx_2+0.25x_1^2-1 \\ge 0.\n\\end{cases}\n\\]\nThe optimal solution is \\(x^*=(0,1)^T\\), and both constraints are active at \\(x^*\\). Are the KKT conditions satisfied?"}
